epics.title: User Authentication
epics.summary: Implement secure user authentication with multi-factor authentication.
epics.description: Develop a secure user authentication system that includes multi-factor authentication (MFA) using OTPs or authenticators. Ensure the system is compliant with industry security standards and capable of handling high traffic volumes.

epics.title: User Profile Management
epics.summary: Manage user profiles including personal details and preferences.
epics.description: Create a user profile management system that allows customers to view and update their personal details and preferences. Ensure the system is secure and provides real-time synchronization with the core banking system.

epics.title: Personalized Dashboard
epics.summary: Develop a personalized dashboard for users based on their profile and eligibility.
epics.description: Design and implement a personalized dashboard that displays available banking products and services based on user profiles and eligibility. The dashboard should provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface, with a focus on responsive design.

epics.title: Core Banking System Integration
epics.summary: Integrate the self-service portal with the core banking system.
epics.description: Develop integration with the core banking system to ensure real-time data synchronization and seamless operation. Implement APIs to allow reading and updating of user data securely and efficiently.

epics.title: Account Opening Workflow
epics.summary: Streamline the account opening process through an efficient workflow.
epics.description: Create a workflow for the online account opening process, minimizing required clicks and steps. The workflow should allow users to save incomplete applications and upload necessary documentation through the interface.

epics.title: Service Modification Workflow
epics.summary: Enable users to submit requests for service modifications.
epics.description: Develop a workflow allowing users to request modifications to their banking services. The system should guide users through the process with clear instructions and require minimal steps to complete.

epics.title: Email Notifications
epics.summary: Implement email notifications for real-time updates.
epics.description: Develop an email notification system that sends real-time updates to users regarding their requests and interactions. Ensure notifications are clear, informative, and maintain user confidentiality.

epics.title: Real-time Status Updates
epics.summary: Provide real-time status updates on user requests.
epics.description: Implement a feature that provides real-time status updates on user-submitted requests within the portal. Ensure users can track the progress of their requests easily and receive immediate feedback.

epics.title: Documentation Upload
epics.summary: Allow users to upload necessary documentation.
epics.description: Create a functional component that enables users to upload required documents directly through the portal interface. Ensure that document uploads are secure and accessible for processing.

epics.title: Interaction History
epics.summary: Maintain a comprehensive history of user interactions.
epics.description: Develop a system to maintain an interaction history of all user activities within the portal. Ensure the history is easily accessible and presented in a clear and organized manner.

epics.title: Role-based Access Control
epics.summary: Implement role-based access control for secure data access.
epics.description: Design and implement role-based access control to ensure users can only view and access services appropriate to their profile and authorization level. Ensure that the control system is secure and flexible to accommodate different user roles.

epics.title: Multi-device Responsiveness
epics.summary: Ensure the portal is responsive across various devices.
epics.description: Develop the portal interface to be fully responsive, providing a consistent user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Test the responsiveness thoroughly and optimize the design for each device type.

epics.title: Advanced Security Protocols
epics.summary: Implement advanced security measures for data protection.
epics.description: Implement advanced security protocols to ensure the protection of sensitive financial data. This includes encryption, secure coding practices, regular security audits, and compliance with relevant regulations.

epics.title: Performance Optimization
epics.summary: Optimize the performance of the self-service portal.
epics.description: Ensure the portal performs efficiently under high traffic conditions. Implement performance monitoring and optimization techniques, including load balancing, caching, and database indexing.

user_stories.epic_title: Implement secure user authentication with multi-factor authentication.
user_stories.title: As a User, I want to use OTP for additional security, so that my login process is more secure.
user_stories.description:
As a User, I want to use OTP for additional security, so that my login process is more secure.

Core Domain Objects:
- OTP

Attributes & Rules:
- OTP should be sent via preferred channel (SMS, email, or authenticator app)
- OTP should expire within 5 minutes
- OTP should be a unique, random code

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: OTP sent via preferred channel (e.g., SMS)
Given the user has provided valid credentials
When the user requests for OTP
Then the OTP should be sent via SMS
And the OTP should expire in 5 minutes

Scenario: OTP expiration after 5 minutes
Given the user has requested an OTP
When 5 minutes have passed
Then the OTP should expire
And the user should not be able to use the expired OTP

Scenario: User enters correct OTP
Given the user has requested an OTP
When the user enters the correct OTP within expiration time
Then the user should be authenticated
And redirected to the dashboard

Scenario: User enters incorrect OTP
Given the user has requested an OTP
When the user enters an incorrect OTP
Then an error message should be displayed
And the user should not be authenticated

Test Cases:

Then the OTP should expire
And the user should not be able to use the expired OTP

Scenario: User enters correct OTP
Given the user has requested an OTP

Then the user should be authenticated
And redirected to the dashboard

Scenario: User enters incorrect OTP
Given the user has requested an OTP
When the user enters an incorrect OTP
Then an error message should be displayed
And the user should not be authenticated

user_stories.epic_title: Implement secure user authentication with multi-factor authentication.
user_stories.title: As a User, I want to use an authenticator app for MFA, so that I have a secure method to verify my identity.
user_stories.description:
As a User, I want to use an authenticator app for MFA, so that I have a secure method to verify my identity.

Core Domain Objects:
- Authenticator App
- Token

Attributes & Rules:
- Ability to link an authenticator app to the user account
- Generate a new authentication code every 30 seconds
- Use time-based one-time password algorithm (TOTP)

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Link authenticator app to user account
Given the user wants to set up MFA
When the user scans the QR code from the authenticator app
Then the app should be linked to the user account

Scenario: Generate new authentication code every 30 seconds
Given the user has linked an authenticator app
When the user checks the app
Then a new authentication code should be generated every 30 seconds

Scenario: User logs in using an authenticator app
Given the user has linked an authenticator app
When the user enters the code generated by the app
Then the user should be authenticated
And redirected to the dashboard

Scenario: User enters incorrect code from authenticator app
Given the user has linked an authenticator app
When the user enters an incorrect code
Then an error message should be displayed
And the user should not be authenticated

Test Cases:

And redirected to the dashboard

Scenario: User enters incorrect code from authenticator app
Given the user has linked an authenticator app
When the user enters an incorrect code
Then an error message should be displayed
And the user should not be authenticated

user_stories.title: As a System Admin, I want to enforce MFA for all users, so that the security of the system is enhanced.
user_stories.description:
As a System Admin, I want to enforce MFA for all users, so that the security of the system is enhanced.

Core Domain Objects:
- User Account
- Policy

Attributes & Rules:
- Mandate MFA for all user accounts
- Notify users of MFA requirement
- Ensure users complete MFA setup before accessing other system functionalities

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Enforce MFA for all users
Given the system requires enhanced security
When the admin sets the policy for MFA
Then all users should be required to set up MFA

Scenario: Notify users of MFA requirement
Given the admin has enforced MFA
When the user logs in without MFA set up
Then the user should be notified to set up MFA
And should not be able to proceed without setting up MFA

Scenario: Users complete MFA setup
Given the user has been notified to set up MFA
When the user follows the setup process
Then the user should complete the MFA setup successfully
And be able to access the system functionalities

user_stories.epic_title: Manage user profiles including personal details and preferences
user_stories.title: View personal details
user_stories.description:
As a customer, I want to view my personal details in my user profile, so that I can ensure all information is correct.

Core Domain Objects:
- User profile
- Personal details

Attributes & Rules:
- Personal details must include name, address, phone number, and email
- The information must be retrieved from the core banking system in real-time

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: View personal details
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
Then they should be able to view their personal details
And the information should be accurate and up-to-date

Scenario: No personal details available
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
And there are no personal details available
Then the system should display a message indicating that no details are available
And provide an option to add personal details

Scenario: Error retrieving details
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
And the system is unable to retrieve personal details due to an error
Then an error message should be displayed
And provide a link to retry or contact support

Test Cases:

Feature: View personal details

Scenario: View personal details
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
Then they should be able to view their personal details
And the information should be accurate and up-to-date

Scenario: No personal details available
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
And there are no personal details available
Then the system should display a message indicating that no details are available
And provide an option to add personal details

Scenario: Error retrieving details
Given the customer is logged in
When they navigate to the user profile page
And the system is unable to retrieve personal details due to an error
Then an error message should be displayed
And provide a link to retry or contact support

Priority: High - Ensures customers can verify their information and keeps the system user-friendly

user_stories.epic_title: Manage user profiles including personal details and preferences
user_stories.title: Update personal details
user_stories.description:
As a customer, I want to update my personal details in my user profile, so that my information remains current.

Core Domain Objects:
- User profile
- Personal details

Attributes & Rules:
- Customers should be able to update name, address, phone number, and email
- Changes should be synchronized in real-time with the core banking system
- Validation rules must be applied for each field (e.g., email format, phone number format)

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Update personal details
Given the customer is logged in
When they update their name, address, phone number, or email
Then the system should save the changes
And synchronize the updated details with the core banking system in real-time

Scenario: Successful data validation
Given the customer is updating their personal details
When they enter valid data in each field
Then the system should accept the data
And provide confirmation that the details have been updated successfully

Scenario: Data validation failure
Given the customer is updating their personal details
When they enter invalid data (e.g., incorrect email format)
Then the system should display a validation error message
And guide the customer to correct the input

Scenario: Error during update
Given the customer is updating their personal details
When an error occurs during the update process
Then the system should display an error message
And allow the customer to retry or contact support

user_stories.epic_title: Manage user profiles including personal details and preferences
user_stories.title: Security measures for profile management
user_stories.description:
As a customer, I want secure access to my user profile, so that my personal details and preferences are protected.

Core Domain Objects:
- User profile
- Security measures

Attributes & Rules:
- Ensure secure login via multi-factor authentication (MFA)
- Implement encryption for personal data
- Log all profile access and updates

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Access with multi-factor authentication
Given the customer is logged in
When they access their user profile
Then they should pass a multi-factor authentication check
And access should be granted securely

Scenario: Data encryption at rest and in transit
Given the customer has personal details stored
When the details are transmitted or stored in the system
Then the data should be encrypted
And only accessible through authorized means

Scenario: Profile access logging
Given the customer accesses their user profile
When any updates are made
Then the system should log the access and changes
Including timestamps and user information

Test Cases:

Feature: Security measures for profile management

Scenario: Access with multi-factor authentication
Given the customer is logged in
When they access their user profile
Then they should pass a multi-factor authentication check
And access should be granted securely

Scenario: Data encryption at rest and in transit
Given the customer has personal details stored
When the details are transmitted or stored in the system
Then the data should be encrypted
And only accessible through authorized means

Scenario: Profile access logging
Given the customer accesses their user profile
When any updates are made
Then the system should log the access and changes
Including timestamps and user information

Priority: High - Ensures customer data protection and compliance with security standards

user_stories.description:

Attributes & Rules:

- Sessions must expire after a predefined period.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successful authentication
Given I have valid credentials
When I attempt to log in
Then I should be authenticated and receive a valid authentication token

Scenario: Authentication with invalid credentials
Given I have invalid credentials
When I attempt to log in
Then I should receive an authentication failure message

Scenario: Expired session
Given I had authenticated previously
When my session time exceeds the expiration period
Then my session should be terminated, and I should be required to reauthenticate

Scenario: Expired session

Then my session should be terminated, and I should be required to reauthenticate

Priority: High - Essential for ensuring secure access to the system.

user_stories.epic_title: Implement role-based access control for secure data access.
user_stories.title: Authorize user access to services
user_stories.description:
As a service, I want to authorize user access, so that users can only access resources and services they are permitted to.

Core Domain Objects:
- User
- Role
- Permission
- Service

Attributes & Rules:
- Each user’s service access must be based on the assigned roles and permissions.
- Unauthorized access attempts must be logged and denied.
- Service endpoints must enforce authorization checks.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Access to permitted service
Given a user with the 'Reporter' role that has 'view_reports' permission
When the user attempts to access the reports service
Then the user should be granted access to the reports service

Scenario: Access to unauthorized service
Given a user without 'edit_reports' permission
When the user attempts to access the report editing service
Then the user should be denied access
And the unauthorized access attempt should be logged

Scenario: Access check for unregistered roles
Given a user with an unregistered role
When the user attempts to access any service
Then the user should be denied access

Test Cases:

Then the user should be granted access to the reports service

When the user attempts to access the report editing service
Then the user should be denied access
And the unauthorized access attempt should be logged

Scenario: Access check for unregistered roles
Given a user with an unregistered role
When the user attempts to access any service
Then the user should be denied access

Priority: High - Critical for enforcing data security and role-based access.

user_stories.description:
As a frontend developer, I want to develop the header, so that users can access key actions and information like search, notifications, and user profile easily.

Figma Design Reference: https://www.figma.com/design/iwPK7TaEJfw92DWcFa7Sqc/banking---sdlc?node-id=1-280&m=dev

Core Domain Objects:
- Header
- Search Bar
- Notification Icon
- User Profile Dropdown

Attributes & Rules:
- Header must be accessible and visible at all times
- Search bar must provide real-time search results
- Notification icon must display count of unread notifications
- User Profile dropdown must list key user actions
